title: Thai Cucumber Salad
description: A refreshing Thai-inspired salad made with cucumber, pickled cucumber, and a hint of polish flavors.
instructions: Slice the cucumber into thin strips.
In a large bowl, combine the sliced cucumber and pickle.
In a small bowl, whisk together the polish and a pinch of salt.
Pour the polish mixture over the cucumber mixture and toss to coat.
Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
